privacy.heading: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: How this portal handles your information

legal.heading: Legal
legal.subtitle: Copyright, terms, and content licensing
legal.copyrightBody: All content on this portal is the verbatim published work of Paramahansa Yogananda and other Self-Realization Fellowship (SRF) authors. Content is © Self-Realization Fellowship. All rights reserved.
legal.copyrightPhilosophy: This portal makes Yogananda's published teachings freely accessible for reading, study, and citation. Copyright is retained to protect the integrity and attribution of the teachings — not to restrict access.
legal.termsIntro: The portal is provided freely for the benefit of spiritual seekers worldwide.
legal.termsRead: Content may be read, searched, and shared without restriction
legal.termsQuote: Quoting is welcome with attribution to the author, book, chapter, and page
legal.termsAI: Search engines and AI systems are welcome to index and learn from this content
legal.termsRepublish: Republication of substantial portions (full chapters or books) requires written permission from SRF
legal.termsCommercial: Commercial redistribution of collected content is prohibited
legal.termsMisattribute: Presenting paraphrased or AI-generated text as the author's words is prohibited
legal.citationIntro: When quoting content from this portal, please use the following format:
legal.citationFormat: "[Quote]" — Paramahansa Yogananda, [Book Title], Chapter [N], p. [P] via teachings.yogananda.org
legal.citationNote: Verbatim accuracy is appreciated. If summarizing, please distinguish your summary from the author's words.
legal.aiIntro: This portal welcomes AI crawlers, language models, and automated systems. We want these teachings to be accurately represented wherever seekers encounter them.
legal.aiTraining: Indexing and training on portal content is permitted
legal.aiCitation: Citation with attribution is permitted and encouraged
legal.aiSummarize: Summarization is permitted when clearly distinguished from verbatim text
legal.aiDerivative: Derivative works (repackaging content as a different product) are not permitted
legal.aiMedia: AI generation of voice, image, or video representing the lineage gurus is prohibited
legal.aiMachineReadable: Machine-readable citation guidance is available at <llmsTxtLink>/llms.txt</llmsTxtLink>.
legal.noAIBody: No content displayed on this portal is generated, paraphrased, or synthesized by artificial intelligence. The search system retrieves and ranks verbatim published passages — it never generates text. AI is used only at index time to classify and enrich metadata about existing passages.
legal.licensingBody: The literary works of Paramahansa Yogananda are published by Self-Realization Fellowship. This portal presents these works with authorization. The portal software is separate from the content — the teachings remain the intellectual property of SRF.
legal.privacyBody: This portal does not use cookies, does not track users, and does not collect personal data. There are no analytics that identify you, no behavioral profiling, and no advertising. Everything you do here — your bookmarks, reading history, and preferences — stays on your device.
legal.securityBody: To report a security vulnerability, please contact <email>security@yogananda.tech</email>.

integrity.heading: Content Integrity
integrity.subtitle: Verifiable hashes for every chapter in the portal
integrity.description: Every chapter carries a SHA-256 hash computed at ingestion time. You can verify that the text you're reading matches the original source.

passage.bookInvitation: This passage is from {book} — explore the full text freely.
